Class Player

java.lang.Object
logic.base.BaseCreature
logic.creatures.Player
public class Player extends BaseCreature
Represents the player character. The player can carry an inventory, equip weapons and armor, use potions, mine resources, and perform combat skills.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    Player.SkillResult
    Immutable record representing the outcome of a player skill.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class logic.base.BaseCreature

    attack, defense, healthPoint, maxHealthPoint

    Creates a new player with the given base stats.

    Description

    addBonus(int atk, int def, int hp, int spd)
    Adds stat bonuses to the player, typically when equipping an item.

    Adds the specified amount of an item to the player's inventory.
    void

    Performs a basic attack on the target, dealing damage equal to the player's attack stat.
    int

    Returns the count of items of the specified type in the inventory.

    Equips the given armor, unequipping any previously equipped armor first.

    Equips the given weapon, unequipping any previously equipped weapon first.

    Restores the player's health by the given amount, capped at max health.

    Skill: Constant Flux — strikes the target 3 times and applies a berserk debuff.

    Skill: Dead Calm — activates a shield wall effect, blocking the next attack.

    Unequips the currently equipped weapon, removing its stat bonuses.

    Uses one potion of the specified type from the inventory, applying its effect.

    Methods inherited from class logic.base.BaseCreature

    getAttack, getHealthPoint, getMaxHealthPoint, isAlive, setAttack, setDefense, setHealthPoint, setMaxHealthPoint, takeDamage

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Player

      public Player(int hp, int attack, int defense)
      Creates a new player with the given base stats. Gold, speed, and luck are initialized to zero.
      Parameters:
      hp - the starting and maximum health points
      attack - the base attack power
      defense - the base defense value

  • Method Details

    • getGold

      public int getGold()
      Returns the player's current gold amount.
      Returns:
      gold

    • setGold

      public void setGold(int gold)
      Sets the player's gold. Value cannot go below zero.
      Parameters:
      gold - the new gold amount

    • getInventory

      public ArrayList<ItemCounter> getInventory()
      Returns the player's inventory as a list of ItemCounter entries.
      Returns:
      inventory list

    • addItem

      public void addItem(BaseItem item, int amount)
      Adds the specified amount of an item to the player's inventory. Stackable items are distributed across existing and new slots. Non-stackable items each occupy their own slot.
      Parameters:
      item - the item to add
      amount - the quantity to add

    • usePotion

      public boolean usePotion(Class<? extends BasePotion> type)
      Uses one potion of the specified type from the inventory, applying its effect.
      Parameters:
      type - the class of the potion to use
      Returns:
      true if a potion was found and used, false otherwise

    • countItem

      public int countItem(Class<?> type)
      Returns the count of items of the specified type in the inventory.
      Parameters:
      type - the class of the item to count
      Returns:
      the quantity found, or 0 if none

    • getEquippedWeapon

      public BaseWeapon getEquippedWeapon()
      Returns the currently equipped weapon, or null if none.
      Returns:
      equipped weapon

    • equipWeapon

      public void equipWeapon(BaseWeapon weapon)
      Equips the given weapon, unequipping any previously equipped weapon first.
      Parameters:
      weapon - the weapon to equip, or null to unequip

    • unequipWeapon

      public void unequipWeapon()
      Unequips the currently equipped weapon, removing its stat bonuses. Does nothing if no weapon is equipped.

    • getEquippedArmor

      public BaseArmor getEquippedArmor()
      Returns the currently equipped armor, or null if none.
      Returns:
      equipped armor

    • equipArmor

      public void equipArmor(BaseArmor armor)
      Equips the given armor, unequipping any previously equipped armor first.
      Parameters:
      armor - the armor to equip, or null to unequip

    • unequipArmor

      public void unequipArmor()
      Unequips the currently equipped armor, removing its stat bonuses. Does nothing if no armor is equipped.

    • addBonus

      public void addBonus(int atk, int def, int hp, int spd)
      Adds stat bonuses to the player, typically when equipping an item.
      Parameters:
      atk - the attack bonus to add
      def - the defense bonus to add
      hp - the max HP bonus to add (also increases current HP)
      spd - the speed bonus to add

    • removeBonus

      public void removeBonus(int atk, int def, int hp, int spd)
      Removes stat bonuses from the player, typically when unequipping an item. Stats are clamped to prevent going below minimum values.
      Parameters:
      atk - the attack bonus to remove
      def - the defense bonus to remove
      hp - the max HP bonus to remove
      spd - the speed bonus to remove

    • heal

      public void heal(int amount)
      Restores the player's health by the given amount, capped at max health.
      Overrides:
      heal in class BaseCreature
      Parameters:
      amount - the amount of health to restore

    • skillKaguraDance

      public Player.SkillResult skillKaguraDance(BaseCreature target)
      Skill: Kagura Dance — deals double attack damage to the target.
      Parameters:
      target - the creature to attack
      Returns:
      the skill result containing damage dealt

    • skillDeadCalm

      public Player.SkillResult skillDeadCalm()
      Skill: Dead Calm — activates a shield wall effect, blocking the next attack.
      Returns:
      the skill result with shield wall flag set to true

    • skillConstantFlux

      public Player.SkillResult skillConstantFlux(BaseCreature target)
      Skill: Constant Flux — strikes the target 3 times and applies a berserk debuff.
      Parameters:
      target - the creature to attack
      Returns:
      the skill result containing total damage dealt and berserk debuff flag

    • skillWaterWheel

      public Player.SkillResult skillWaterWheel(BaseCreature target)
      Skill: Water Wheel — deals damage and heals the player for 30% of the net damage dealt.
      Parameters:
      target - the creature to attack
      Returns:
      the skill result containing damage dealt and heal amount

    • getHealth

      public int getHealth()
      Returns the player's current health points.
      Returns:
      current HP

    • setHealth

      public void setHealth(int hp)
      Sets the player's current health, clamped between 0 and max health.
      Parameters:
      hp - the new health value

    • getMaxHealth

      public int getMaxHealth()
      Returns the player's maximum health points.
      Returns:
      max HP

    • getStrength

      public int getStrength()
      Returns the player's attack (strength) stat.
      Returns:
      attack stat

    • setStrength

      public void setStrength(int v)
      Sets the player's attack stat. Minimum value is 0.
      Parameters:
      v - the new attack value

    • getLuck

      public int getLuck()
      Returns the player's luck stat.
      Returns:
      luck stat

    • setLuck

      public void setLuck(int v)
      Sets the player's luck stat. Minimum value is 0.
      Parameters:
      v - the new luck value

    • getDefense

      public int getDefense()
      Returns the player's defense stat.
      Overrides:
      getDefense in class BaseCreature
      Returns:
      defense stat

    • getSpeed

      public int getSpeed()
      Returns the player's speed stat.
      Returns:
      speed stat

    • attack

      public void attack(BaseCreature target)
      Performs a basic attack on the target, dealing damage equal to the player's attack stat.
      Specified by:
      attack in class BaseCreature
      Parameters:
      target - the creature to attack
